summary: Phase 2 Customer Interface testing completed successfully. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). All 4 new frontend pages (My Bookings, My Reviews, Payments, Invoices) working correctly with proper UI elements, data display, and navigation.

backend_my_bookings.detail: GET /api/auth/my-bookings returns bookings with status_label, status_color, stage, venues array

backend_my_reviews.detail: GET /api/auth/my-reviews returns reviews with venue info enrichment

backend_my_payments.detail: GET /api/auth/my-payments returns payment history (empty for test customer)

backend_my_invoices.detail: GET /api/auth/my-invoices returns invoices (empty for test customer)

backend_create_review.detail: POST /api/venues/{venue_id}/reviews creates review and returns review_id

backend_auth_required.detail: All 4 new endpoints return 401 without authentication

frontend_dashboard_quick_actions.detail: Dashboard shows all 6 quick action buttons: Browse Venues, My Bookings, My Reviews, Payments, Invoices, Favorites, Profile

frontend_my_bookings_page.detail: My Bookings page loads with filter chips (All/Active/Completed), booking cards with venue images, status badges, progress bars, expandable timeline

frontend_my_bookings_timeline.detail: Booking timeline shows 8 stages: Enquiry Received, Expert Assigned, Site Visit, Negotiation, Date Locked, Deposit Made, Final Checks, Event Complete

frontend_my_reviews_page.detail: My Reviews page loads with stats (total count, avg rating), review cards, Write a Review button

frontend_write_review_modal.detail: Write Review modal opens with venue selection, star rating, title input, content textarea, submit button

frontend_payments_page.detail: Payments page loads with Total Paid summary card, empty state message

frontend_invoices_page.detail: Invoices page loads with empty state message

frontend_protected_routes.detail: All 4 new pages redirect to /login when not authenticated

frontend_navigation.detail: Back buttons on all 4 pages navigate to /my-enquiries dashboard

critical_code_review_comments: All 4 new pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Backend endpoints correctly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Status tracking with STAGE_MAP provides good UX for booking progress
Write Review modal correctly fetches venues from bookings for selection
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test review via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Customer Interface fully tested. Customer has 4 bookings (leads), 1 review (created during testing), 0 payments, 0 invoices. All new pages accessible from dashboard quick actions. My Bookings shows timeline with 8 stages. My Reviews has Write Review modal with venue selection from bookings. Payments and Invoices show empty states. All pages have back navigation to /my-enquiries.

mocked_apis.note: Razorpay is in test mode but no payment testing was done
